title: sterculia tonkinensis
intro: Sterculia tonkinensis, also known as the Velvet Persimmon or Tung oil tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain tung oil, a rich source of unsaturated fatty acids. The medicinal properties of Sterculia tonkinensis include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. In terms of health benefits, the plant is believed to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, with herbal preparations including oil extracts and infusions for topical and internal use.
